product_description: Sora is a digital reading platform that provides K-12 students with access to ebooks, audiobooks, and magazines from their school or public library. It offers tools for reading personalization and integrates with educational systems.

vendor_resources.justification: This is a direct link to the accessibility section of Sora's official help documentation, listing multiple accessibility-related articles.

vendor_resources.text: Which screen readers work with Sora? (Sora Help)
vendor_resources.justification: This specific help article details screen reader compatibility and mentions WCAG guidelines conformance for Sora.

other_resources.text: Sora Accessibility Features For Low Vision (Veroniiiica)
other_resources.justification: This blog post provides a detailed, third-party review of Sora's accessibility features specifically for users with low vision.
